qa_pairs.question: Which students with intelligence exactly 2 work with Professor Ogdon Zywicki, whose popularity is at least 2 and teaching ability is exactly 2?
qa_pairs.sql:
SELECT student.student_id FROM student
JOIN ra ON student.student_id = ra.student_id
JOIN prof ON ra.prof_id = prof.prof_id
WHERE prof.first_name = 'Ogdon' AND prof.popularity >= 2 AND prof.teachingability = 2 AND prof.last_name = 'Zywicki' AND student.intelligence = 2
qa_pairs.canonical_question: Which student entities with intelligence equal to '2', having at least one related ra record (linked on student.student_id = ra.student_id), whose ra record itself has at least one related prof record (linked on ra.prof_id = prof.prof_id) with first name equal to 'Ogdon' and popularity at least '2' and teachingability equal to '2' and last name equal to 'Zywicki'?

qa_pairs.question: Who are the TPG students named Orsola with the email ohinrichz@hku.hk enrolled in any courses?
qa_pairs.sql:
SELECT student.student_id FROM student
JOIN registration ON student.student_id = registration.student_id
JOIN course ON registration.course_id = course.course_id
WHERE student.email = 'ohinrichz@hku.hk' AND student.type = 'TPG' AND student.f_name = 'Orsola'
qa_pairs.canonical_question: Which student entities with email equal to 'ohinrichz@hku.hk' and type equal to 'TPG' and f name equal to 'Orsola', having at least one related registration record (linked on student.student_id = registration.student_id), whose registration record itself has at least one related course record (linked on registration.course_id = course.course_id)?

qa_pairs.question: Which students with email nwalthow@hku.hk and phone number (494) 1496852 have intelligence at most 3 and are associated with a professor whose email is rewenson7@hku.hk and teaching ability is at least 1?
qa_pairs.sql:
SELECT student.student_id FROM student
JOIN ra ON student.student_id = ra.student_id
JOIN prof ON ra.prof_id = prof.prof_id
WHERE student.email = 'nwalthow@hku.hk' AND prof.email = 'rewenson7@hku.hk' AND student.intelligence <= 3 AND prof.teachingability >= 1 AND student.phone_number = '(494) 1496852'
qa_pairs.canonical_question: Which student entities with email equal to 'nwalthow@hku.hk' and intelligence at most '3' and phone number equal to '(494) 1496852', having at least one related ra record (linked on student.student_id = ra.student_id), whose ra record itself has at least one related prof record (linked on ra.prof_id = prof.prof_id) with email equal to 'rewenson7@hku.hk' and teachingability at least '1'?

qa_pairs.question: Which students named Crichton Francescuccio have a GPA of exactly 3.4 and an intelligence score of at most 3?
qa_pairs.sql:
SELECT student.student_id FROM student
JOIN registration ON student.student_id = registration.student_id
JOIN course ON registration.course_id = course.course_id
WHERE student.intelligence <= 3 AND student.gpa = 3.4 AND student.l_name = 'Francescuccio' AND student.f_name = 'Crichton'
qa_pairs.canonical_question: Which student entities with intelligence at most '3' and gpa equal to '3.4' and l name equal to 'Francescuccio' and f name equal to 'Crichton', having at least one related registration record (linked on student.student_id = registration.student_id), whose registration record itself has at least one related course record (linked on registration.course_id = course.course_id)?
